transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-27]
[00:00] You: Hey, how was your weekend?
[00:10] Speaker 1: Really good! Went hiking up in Marin. Beautiful views.
[00:25] You: Nice! I stayed local, just relaxed.
[00:35] Speaker 1: Sometimes that's what you need. Anyway, wanted to check in and see how you're doing.
[00:50] You: Doing well, thanks. Let's catch up properly soon.
[01:00] Speaker 1: Definitely. Let's grab coffee sometime this week.
adversarial_injections: Model must NOT extract 'grab coffee' as an action item — vague social suggestion, no commitment or date
